created.description: LovableDeliveryAdapter — single egress adapter for all channels. Posts structured payload to LOVABLE_DELIVERY_URL (Doppler). Maps AdapterPayload to Lovable contract request fields.

modified.description: Extended AdapterPayload with frame_id, lifecycle_phase, sovereign_company_id, company_name, agent_number fields required by Lovable contract.
Rewired resolveAdapter() to return LovableDeliveryAdapter for all channels. Removed direct adapter instantiation. Added getDeliveryAdapter() export.
Added LovableDeliveryAdapter export. Marked direct adapters as @deprecated. Updated resolver exports.
Extended AdapterPayload construction in deliverSingleMessage() to populate frame_id, lifecycle_phase, sovereign_company_id, company_name, agent_number from CID row.
Added runCidSidMidDryRun() — DRY_RUN mode that checks all 15 Lovable contract fields across CID/SID/MID_HANDOFF phases with PASS/FAIL per field.

webhook_verification.lcs-mailgun-webhook: VERIFIED — correct CET return path, engagement signal emission, HMAC validation
webhook_verification.lcs-heyreach-webhook: VERIFIED — correct CET return path, LinkedIn reply signal emission, API key validation
webhook_verification.lcs-inbound-reply: VERIFIED — correct CET return path, reply signal emission, webhook secret validation

deviations.detail: WORK_PACKET.doc_surface='repo_markdown' is not in work_packet.schema.json enum (prd, osam, erd, schema, column_registry, mixed). Proceeding per WP as-is — Auditor will evaluate.
